_comment: Terrain defs live in this sibling file, not pack.json (plan 014 step 10 decision: the mapping is one entry per 8-neighbour blob key -- dozens of entries -- and keeping it out of pack.json keeps that file's hand-authored fields readable). Generated by scripts/pixel-crawler/gen_terrains.py -- do not hand-edit `mapping`; re-run the script after any Floors_Tiles.png change.
